---
title: "Koushik Khan"
description: "A data scientist by profession, an avid learner and a techie by heart"
from: markdown+emoji
image: profile-pic.jpg
about:
    template: trestles
    image-shape: round
    image-width: 15em
    links:
      - icon: twitter
        text: Twitter
        href: https://twitter.com/koushikKhan92
      - icon: linkedin
        text: LinkedIn
        href: https://linkedin.com/in/koushikkhan
      - icon: github
        text: GitHub
        href: https://github.com/koushikkhan
      - icon: mailbox
        text: Contact Me
        href: mailto:koushikkhan38@gmail.com
---

Hello, I am Koushik Khan. I work as a Sr. Data Scientist at S&P Global Inc., Bangalore, India. 

I have more than seven years of industry experience in working with varied data sets with right set of tools to help stakeholders taking informed decisions. 

This website is my personal page where I usually share my experiences in the form of blog posts. 


<!-- The advancement in the world of technology is fast-paced that makes it difficult to keep track of everything. But most of these advancements follow some fundamentals.

Being strong at fundamentals not only make us stand out among others but also helps to upskill in a far better way while enjoying every bit of the journey.

The whole intention of putting this website is to share knowledge on various things that I am learning, in a lucid way as it is the best way to learn things correctly.

If you like this approach, I am sure you will enjoy the contents. -->

The list below is to help you navigate through the site.

+ :house_with_garden: Home: this is where you are at right now
+ :books: Blog: posts that I have written are available here
+ :gear: Projects: links to all my personal projects in GitHub
+ :seedling: Skills: detailes of some handpicked projects where I have contributed as a professional
+ :clipboard: Resume: my latest resume is attached here 
+ :man: About: things to know about myself

Thanks.
